_comment: Local app-specific Pelican egg for map-grid
name: map-grid node.js
author: GitHub Copilot
description:
Pelican egg for the map-grid Vite app.

Clones the repository, installs dependencies, builds the frontend, and serves the generated dist output through server.mjs.
startup: if [[ -d .git ]] && [[ {{AUTO_UPDATE}} == "1" ]]; then BRANCH_NAME="${BRANCH:-$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)}"; git fetch --all --prune; git reset --hard "origin/${BRANCH_NAME}"; fi; if [[ ! -z ${NODE_PACKAGES} ]]; then /usr/local/bin/npm install ${NODE_PACKAGES}; fi; if [[ ! -z ${UNNODE_PACKAGES} ]]; then /usr/local/bin/npm uninstall ${UNNODE_PACKAGES}; fi; if [ -f /home/container/package.json ]; then /usr/local/bin/npm ci; /usr/local/bin/npm run build; fi; /usr/local/bin/node "/home/container/${MAIN_FILE}" ${NODE_ARGS}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# map-grid Pelican Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
apt update
apt install -y git curl jq file unzip make gcc g++ python3 python3-dev python3-pip libtool

echo -e "updating npm. please wait..."
npm install npm@latest --location=global

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

if [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "true" ] || [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "1" ]; then
    echo -e "assuming user knows what they are doing have a good day."
    exit 0
fi

if [[ ${GIT_ADDRESS} != *.git ]]; then
    GIT_ADDRESS=${GIT_ADDRESS}.git
fi

if [ -z "${USERNAME}" ] && [ -z "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
    echo -e "using anon api call"
else
    GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo -e ${GIT_ADDRESS} | cut -d/ -f3-)"
fi

if [ "$(ls -A /mnt/server)" ]; then
    echo -e "/mnt/server directory is not empty."
    if [ -d .git ]; then
        echo -e ".git directory exists"
        if [ -f .git/config ]; then
            echo -e "loading info from git config"
            ORIGIN=$(git config --get remote.origin.url)
        else
            echo -e "files found with no git config"
            echo -e "closing out without touching things to not break anything"
            exit 10
        fi
    fi

    if [ "${ORIGIN}" == "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
        echo "pulling latest from github"
        git pull
    fi
else
    echo -e "/mnt/server is empty.\ncloning files into repo"
    if [ -z ${BRANCH} ]; then
        echo -e "cloning default branch"
        git clone ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
    else
        echo -e "cloning ${BRANCH}'"
        git clone --single-branch --branch ${BRANCH} ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
    fi
fi

echo "Installing nodejs packages"
if [[ ! -z ${NODE_PACKAGES} ]]; then
    /usr/local/bin/npm install ${NODE_PACKAGES}
fi

if [ -f /mnt/server/package.json ]; then
    /usr/local/bin/npm install
    /usr/local/bin/npm run build
fi

echo -e "install complete"
exit 0

variables.name: Additional Arguments
variables.description: Any extra arguments to pass to node when starting server.mjs.

variables.name: Additional Node packages
variables.description: Install additional npm packages. Use spaces to separate package names.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pull the latest files from the repo on startup.

variables.name: Git Access Token
variables.description: Optional token used for private repository access.

variables.name: Git Repo Address
variables.description: Repository URL to clone for this app.

variables.name: Git Username
variables.description: Username used for authenticated git access.

variables.name: Install Branch
variables.description: The git branch to clone during install.

variables.name: Main file
variables.description: Entry file that serves the built app.

variables.name: Uninstall Node packages
variables.description: Uninstall npm packages before startup. Use spaces to separate package names.

variables.name: User Uploaded Files
variables.description: Skip git clone and install logic when files are uploaded manually.
